---
title: "Progress log"
---

## To-do

* [x] Explore possible topics / look for potential datasets/sources
* [x] Finalize topic 
* [x] Data collection and cleaning
* [x] Initial EDA and data visualizations
* [x] Static plots
* [x] Interactive plots
* [x] Infographic
* [x] Optional Gen AI
* [x] Put together report
* [x] Final edits


## Akshay Arun

[About Akshay](../site_pages/about.qmd#aksha-arun)

**Project contributions**

* Project planning and organization

* Linked view visualization

* Infographic

* Static plots (multivariate linear regression)


## Alexa Nakanishi

[About Alexa](../site_pages/about.qmd#alexa-nakanishi)

**Project contributions**

* Initial plot visualizations

* Static plots

* Interactive visualizations (folium map)

* Streamlit app with Gen AI component

* Initial report outline

## Norman Wang

[About Norman](../site_pages/about.qmd#norman-wang)

**Project contributions**

* Data collection and cleaning

* Initial EDA and plot visualizations
